goal: 清理 Mainline skill 的短语级 override 表达

summary.title: 清理 stop-line 的短语级 override 表达
summary.what: 将上一轮 dogfood 后过度补偿的短语级 override 表达清理为语言无关的语义模型：从 Mainline skill frontmatter、Stop-Line Quick Matrix、Trigger Policy、Stop-Line Workflow、AGENTS full template 和 stub template 中移除具体中文短语映射，改为 advice/read-only、finish/commit/seal/handoff、push/open/update PR、merge/release/deploy/package publish 等 instruction classes。保留 publish object disambiguation、overlap inspect/classify/check、PR body marker 协议和 gh pr create --body-file 正例。AGENTS managed template 升级到 v26，stub 升级到 v15。
summary.why: grill-me 结论是 canonical Mainline skill 应提供边界模型，而不是用户口语短语表。短语表会诱导关键词匹配、地方化 public skill，并把本应由语义判断处理的指令写成个人工作流贴纸。agent 仍需要 stop-line quick matrix、publish 目标消歧、overlap 分类和 PR marker 协议，但这些都应该用语言无关的概念表达。
summary.user_goal: 清理 Mainline skill 的短语级 override 表达

decisions.chose: 移除中文短语 alias 列表，保留语言无关的 instruction class
decisions.rationale: Mainline canonical skill 的目标是正确决策框架，不是最大化个人口语触发率；模型应按语义判断 current-instruction override。

decisions.chose: 保留 quick matrix，但把 User wording 改成 Instruction class
decisions.rationale: quick matrix 对 fresh agent 有用，但不能写成短语到权限的关键词映射表。

decisions.chose: 继续保留 mainline publish object disambiguation、overlap inspect/classify/check、PR marker/body-file invariant
decisions.rationale: 这些是 dogfood 暴露出的真实协议/术语边界，不是语言本地化例子。

decisions.chose: 同步 full AGENTS template 到 v26、stub 到 v15，并通过 mainline agents update 刷新仓库 AGENTS.md
decisions.rationale: agent 实际读取的 repo guidance 必须和 canonical skill 表达一致。

rejected.alternative: 保留中文短语作为 trigger aliases
rejected.reason: 这适合个人全局 skill 或 dogfood/eval fixture，不适合 public canonical skill 的核心规则。
dogfood 证明靠前的 first-pass boundary decision 有价值，问题在短语表形式而不是 matrix 本身。

review_notes: Focused verification: git diff --check; go run . agents check --json; go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestAgents' -count=1.
Global skill was reinstalled from ./skills/mainline and grep confirmed the installed skill no longer contains the removed Chinese phrase aliases.
mainline update-real --no-pull rebuilt the local wrapper target from b61c83f.

architectural_claims: Canonical Mainline skill should express current-instruction overrides as semantic instruction classes rather than language-specific phrase aliases.
Stop-line quick guidance remains a first-pass decision aid, but it must not be implemented as keyword matching.
Publish object disambiguation, overlap classification, and PR marker body protocol remain canonical Mainline agent contract.
behavioral_changes: Agents no longer see Chinese workflow phrases in skill frontmatter or stop-line override tables.
Agents are explicitly told to interpret current instructions semantically, not by keyword matching.
AGENTS managed guidance now describes override classes instead of example phrases.
security_implications: Reduces risk of agents overfitting lifecycle authority to locale-specific keywords.
migration_notes: AGENTS managed template version bumped to 26 and stub version to 15; run mainline agents update to refresh repo guidance.
Existing global Mainline skill installs still require npx --yes skills update mainline --global --yes or the matching skills add command.
